text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: What was that? Dad... collapsed?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: So this whole time, he just kept chuggin' along, sufferin' in secret... But why?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And where's Dad right now?! He's at the hospital?
Okay, got it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've traveled to Fuchu from Kyoto, and now
we're turning right around to head back to Osaka.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Little Brother
text_block_list.text: Tama... Is Dad okay?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, everythin's just fine. The doctor said all he
needs is a li'l bit of rest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After dropping by the hospital, we've come to her
family home. Tamamo Cross's report wasn't
entirely accurate, though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While his condition isn't critical, the doctor said
he needs rest. He also couldn't give us an
estimate as to how long it would take him to
recover.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So don't you squirts worry your li'l heads about
nothin'. Just go 'n play. Your big sis'll sort all this
out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she puts her siblings' minds at ease, I look at
Tamamo Cross's expression.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her usual roughness is fading away, with kindness
taking its place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for draggin' ya along to shop for tonight's
dinner. I think we got all the stuff we need now,
though.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: A talk? ...About what?
choice_data_list: Are you thinking about quitting racing?
Are you thinking about quitting racing?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-what makes you say that?
choice_data_list: It's written all over your face.
It's written all over your face.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Geez, nothin' gets by you, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Somebody's clearly gotta be here at home.
'Specially since I don't know what's gonna happen
with my dad.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I run for the sake of my family... So if my family
needs me more than my runnin', then my choice is
clear.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
At least I managed to make 'em happy once by
winnin' the spring Tenno Sho. That's something, I
guess...
choice_data_list: Are you sure you won't regret quitting?
Are you sure you won't regret quitting?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Nah, I don't think I will. Sure, it sucks that I'll
never get to dominate the Twinkle Series. But...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I did everythin' I could, the best I could. I got no
regrets. Nothin'... at all...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Urk!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Of all the racers to come to mind... Why'd it have
to be—ah, forget it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross cuts herself off. The next morning,
she goes to check on her family and breaks the
news to them while she's there.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Mother
text_block_list.text: Tama... Are ya bein' serious? You're quittin'?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah. Since Dad's gotta stay put and rest for a
while, I needa be 'round to look after him and the
squirts. This is no time to be runnin'.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I... I gotta support—listen, family's my number
one priority! That's why...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer, can I ask ya somethin'?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her father calls out to me from his sickbed.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text:
Tell me... How's Tama's prospects lookin'? Are
things gonna get rough for her?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text:
I've heard it all before. "How's she gonna make it
without money for trainin'?" "How's she s'posed to
compete with that li'l body of hers?"

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text:
But ya know what? I still believed in Tama the
whole way... But what 'bout you? You've been
with her all this time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Looking into his eyes, I come to realize
something. He doesn't just want me to put his
mind at ease. He wants the truth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have to give him a thorough evaluation of
Tamamo Cross—with no frills.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This family's future hinges on my assessment of
Tamamo Cross's career so far and her future
potential...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I promise I'm gonna start eatin' right. It
might take some time, but I'll get there, bit by
bit.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... That's right... My secret weapon... is
comin' in like a flash of light!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Check out da new 'n improved White Lightnin'!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think back to the path White Lightning's taken...
She has always run along the ground, charging
further and further ahead. And she hasn't slowed
down at all. In fact...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As long as she has that strong spirit and caring
heart...
choice_data_list: I think she should keep running.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Trainer?!
choice_data_list: I know she's got more wins in her! Way more!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text: ...I see. That's all I needed to know.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text: It's too early for ya to come home. Tama... You need to run.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I know it's too early, but I do everythin' for you
guys, Dad! I—

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text: And you're gonna be runnin' for us, too! That's da best thing you can do for us!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
His words carry a great weight of emotions,
deepening their impact.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text:
Ya don't know how excited your family gets
watchin' ya run.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text:
Or how happy it makes us. To see you—that same
girl who used to zoom about all over the
place—runnin' so free 'n fulla life.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text:
Since the day you were born... your mom and I
have been lookin' forward to a day like this.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text:
We said you were our hope. We didn't have
nothin' to our name, but you gave us hope—like a
light shinin' on us, saying we'd be happy
someday...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text:
Course, we had our fair share of struggles. And
there might be more in store. But...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text:
Seein' ya run so happy 'n healthy sends my worries
packin'. They all go right out the window.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text: You're not our hope 'cause ya support our household. All ya gotta do to be our hope is run!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Dad...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text:
...I don't mind ya quittin' once you've done all ya
can. But what's the point in quittin' halfway, just
for us? What about all that work you've put in so
far?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text: Run, Tama! All our dreams are restin' on ya.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Little Brother
text_block_list.text: Yeah, Tama! Get out there 'n run!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her little brother pipes up.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Little Brother
text_block_list.text:
I love seein' ya run, Tama! Way more than I like
you playin' with us at home!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It's so fun talkin' about all your races. And I
like the photos ya send us too!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Tama, we'll manage just fine. So please... keep on
runnin'. Make your father happy.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Mother
text_block_list.text: Cause to him, you're the whole world.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Mom... Dad... You guys...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I can't believe that slipped my mind. It's my
runnin' that gives ya hope...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: And that's why... That's why I gotta give it a real shot. I'm gonna run, and I'm gonna win!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
My next stop's the Takarazuka Kinen! So I'm
gonna need ya to kick this sickness of yours in the
butt, Dad! Don't go makin' the li'l squirts sad!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Just you wait, I'll zoom right up to the front, and then no one will stop me! No one will stop us! Let's do dis!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Little Brother
text_block_list.text: Yeah... We got your back, Tama!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her whole family erupts into a unified cheer that
echoes throughout the Osaka hospital. It looks
like that settles it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross will keep on running—as one with
her family.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Welp... I'm back, Tokyo.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I really thought I wouldn't have any regrets if I
quit. Felt like I'd done the best I could. But...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Gotta admit, there was still this liiittle firework
inside me that just wouldn't fade away.
choice_data_list: Is that firework your fighting spirit?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Nah... Well, kinda, but not quite. The fire that I
couldn't put out, no matter what I did, was—

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Welcome back, Tama.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oguri... Ya came all the way to pick me up just to
say that?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... Well, to be honest, I wasn't sure what to
do, but... I wanted to see you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I felt like you might not actually come
back if I didn't. Um... Anyway, welcome back,
Tama.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ya already said that a minute ago.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(Oguri... What gives? Why didja come to welcome
me back?)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(I guess we are pretty similar. We're both from
outta town, and neither of us were born with
silver spoons in our mouths. Still...)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(Right when I was 'bout to throw in the towel...
Why was it your face that flashed through my
mind?)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: (What was that all about? I don't get it... but...)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Lookin' at ya now... brought it all back. There's no
way I could just up 'n leave ya behind.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Isn't that right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Tamamo Cross looks at Oguri Cap, I see her
eyes dazzling with countless colors.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Now let's get goin' to the Takarazuka Kinen!
Oguri, you're in for a treat. 'Cause that's where
I'm gonna show ya how I run when I got nothin'
holdin' me back!
